message:
feat(core): add JIT template fields to PreparedStatement for hot INSERT bypass

V3.2: Add jit_insert_template and jit_execution_count fields to
PreparedStatement. After the hot threshold (tracked by execution_count),
try_compile_insert() can populate the template to enable future VDBE
bypass for simple sequential INSERTs.

Currently the fields are initialized to None/0 — the actual dispatch
bypass (checking jit_insert_template before entering the VDBE engine)
is the next integration step. This commit establishes the data flow.

Updated all 15 PreparedStatement construction sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
